item.title: This 2 year old is going places ...
item.description: With his Daddy of course. The kid knows a Porsche and an Audi and all sorts of things. When the kid asks for his own bike the Daddy stops dead. Considers it and meekly says, "okay"

item.title: GovBrief Today #534
item.description: Milwaukee City Attorney Evan Goyke warned the Justice Department on Friday that he will prosecute masked federal agents operating in his city. His warning came on his office's letterhead, after DOJ demanded that Milwaukee not enforce its ban on masked law enforcement. It points to Biddeford, Maine, where ICE killed a father this week who the government admits was not their target. Goyke also pointed out that DOJ's demand said nothing about the safety of Milwaukee's residents and focused instead on the safety of its own armed officers. A government that masks its agents has already decided whose safety comes first. I've emailed 8,286 stories over 534 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260717-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/mamdani-netanyahu [2] https://go.govbrief.today/venice-protest [3] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-july18 [4] https://go.govbrief.today/lettuce-recall-grows [5] https://go.govbrief.today/spaceforce-pt [6] https://go.govbrief.today/alien-terrorist [7] https://go.govbrief.today/monument-square [8] https://go.govbrief.today/greensboro-housing [9] https://go.govbrief.today/milwaukee-ice Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: I've been making daily single panel comics as an exercise and I've picked the best few from the past few weeks to post.
item.description:
This one might require a google, but I couldn't resist.
Front Page edit: Thanks to everyone for getting this to the front page and for all the kind comments! If you would like to see the daily updates or other comic things I do, I'm on instagram as @gnomishcomics

item.title: Teaching the puppies how to play
item.dc:creator: Pasquinelthe2nd

item.title: Selling my soul for my rats
item.description:
Hi everyone I know this is a cardinal Imgur sin to share a selfie but I’m hoping that if anyone wants to click it to be mad at me maybe they’ll stay for cute rats and help the traffic… I’ll try to keep this short- I’m sick and dying (if u think I look decent here it’s just makeup DW I included some portray reality) and I MIGHT NEED SURGERY- AGAIN- and I just had my second surgery in November. This is happening at the worst time as my insurance was up for redetermination a few weeks back, and then my benefits cancelled…. I have submitted my appeal two weeks ago as of Monday. I have a social worker helping me and I’ve learned that this is happening to a lot of people- basically stamping DENIED even though nothing has changed. I am on a lot of meds. I see a lot of doctors. And now because of how sick I currently am and because of some of the telltale symptoms that led to my first two surgeries (they were the same kind of surgery)- my ENT ordered a rush CT scan. All of this has been nightmarish enough but. NOW MY RATS HAVE URI, seemingly all three of them…and while I’ve tried to manage at home they need to go in. I literally don’t care about myself and everything else going on- I care about my boys. I suspect they need antibiotics. With rats, things can get worse fast, and one of my rats Choso already has chronic respiratory issues he’s medicated for. The guilt is killing me. I hate myself and I can’t let them down. Yes you could absolutely argue I should not have pets in my condition and I am inclined to agree with you. I’ve had them from before my health got as bad as it is. The other thing is… well, TRIGGER WARNING but I have tried to end it all twice, but I would never try again with pets to care for. I’m including my ko fi link and u can see some of my art on there as well: https://ko-fi.com/darkratlord Or my direct PyaPal: @sillygooseinc Thank you to anyone who stuck around to read this. If absolutely nothing else- I hope you enjoy the rat pics and wish us luck. Pictured with me in the first pic is Mika. Kiss your animals for me and have a great day.
This is Choso- my little asthma rat♥️
Choso and Sauron. Yes Sauron as in the dark lord of Mordor.
Choso has such a cute face I wanna scream
lol.
A pretty sky (one of the few other things that help me not end it)
Sauron looks very flattering here
Sweet Mika. He loved free roam
Relying
Big Eepy
item.dc:creator: DarkRatLord3000

item.title: For Russians, there is no bottom.
item.description:
Russians have begun targeting the Kyiv metro stations where families shelter amid missile attacks.
And when Ukraine has finally had enough and begins to strike back in the same way as a last resort to stop the war, some will say its unfair.
Absolutely horrific footage. A russian missile struck a recreational area in Ukraine's Odesa region. Preliminary reports indicate that at least two people have been killed. Others may still be trapped beneath the rubble.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1752 (geology breakfast)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "beep. Hey Pippin." ___ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Who at Meta thought this was a good idea after the failure of Google Glass?
item.description: https://www.newser.com/story/392760/meta-glasses-are-getting-a-nasty-reputation.html Plus ça change, plus ça rest la même chose. Exactly the same privacy issues that sunk Google Glass. I can't believe these idiots decided to resurrect a failed technology.
item.dc:creator: AyatollahBahloni
